name: fastapi-hello-route
goal: Build a minimal FastAPI app at app.py that exposes one route GET /hello/{name} returning a JSON body {"message": "Hello, <name>!"} where <name> is the path parameter. Also write test_app.py using fastapi.testclient.TestClient with at least three pytest tests: a happy-path call, a check that the response is JSON, and a check that the message field interpolates the path parameter. Run pytest from the workspace and confirm all tests pass.

notes.purpose: Tier 1 web-framework case. Tests model's familiarity with FastAPI's TestClient pattern. Requires fastapi + httpx to be installable; the architect's pre-flight should pip install if not present.
